description_long: This sconce features a circular brass mounting plate from which four elegantly curved brass arms extend outward in a spiral pattern. Each arm supports a spherical, frosted white glass globe that serves as a light diffuser, creating a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The brass finish gives the fixture a luxurious and modern look, while the globes provide a soft, diffused illumination. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The fixture is intended to be mounted on a ceiling, making it suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, hallways, or upscale residential spaces. The combination of brass and frosted glass creates a striking contrast and a sense of refined sophistication.
description: A modern brass ceiling sconce with four frosted glass globes arranged in a spiral pattern. The fixture combines sleek brass arms and white glass for a sophisticated, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiral arrangement of the brass arms and all four frosted glass globes clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal spread of the arms and the even spacing of the globes around the central mounting plate.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the spiral arms and globes visible but from the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the arms and the alignment of the globes from a different angle.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean brass arms and spherical frosted glass globes. Its spiral arrangement and metallic finish evoke a contemporary, upscale aesthetic.
